title: Black & White Redstone Lamps
description: Resource pack that makes unpowered redstone lamps black and powered ones white.
body:
![example use case as a binary input/output display](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/FOOjLtA3/images/6e472154063821da9b09603e65c03b41a21a47c3.png)

Resource pack that makes unpowered redstone lamps black and powered ones white.\
Great for building redstone displays and debugging computational redstone.\
\
Very simple yet very useful.
